page: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v4 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DDSv4 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor operating at 2.6 GHz. The x86_64 architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX, AVX-512, and AVX512_VNNI. The system is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per vCPU.

This server includes 307 GB of local SSD storage and is premium storage capable, making it suitable for workloads requiring fast local scratch space. In benchmark evaluations, the D8ds_v4 demonstrates consistent mid-tier performance. It achieves average results in single-core and multi-core stress-ng tests, as well as standard memory bandwidth tests, with uncached read speeds of 50.58 GB/sec. However, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression represents a performance bottleneck, scoring in the bottom 25% tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D8ds_v4 offers a balanced resource density profile, combining dedicated compute, local storage, and moderate memory without the premium cost of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated instances. This makes it a practical choice for general-purpose applications, static web serving, database operations, and lightweight LLM inference tasks using small models.
description: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v4 is a general-purpose virtual machine powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs across 4 physical cores, 32.0 GB of RAM, and 307 GB of local SSD storage. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this x86_64 instance supports AVX-512 instructions. Benchmark data positions the D8ds_v4 in the average tier for most compute and memory tasks, including static web serving and small-model LLM inference, though multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performance is relatively weak. With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and premium storage capabilities, this server offers a cost-effective profile for general-purpose workloads, relational databases, and application servers requiring moderate local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v4 is a general-purpose VM featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 307 GB local SSD storage, delivering balanced performance for databases and web serving.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D8ds_v4 is a general-purpose VM with 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 307 GB local SSD, optimized for balanced workloads.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel processors, moderate memory density, and fast local SSD storage.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated vCPUs on an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor
32 GB of system memory with a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
307 GB of local SSD storage with Premium Storage support
Average performance across standard compute and database benchmarks
Well-suited for general-purpose applications, web serving, and databases
